title: Speech-Language Pathology Assistant
description: Support our speech-language pathologists at Abbott Laboratories in delivering therapy and rehabilitation to patients with communication and swallowing disorders.
responsibilities: Assist with patient assessments and therapy sessions under SLP supervision
Implement therapeutic activities and exercises with patients
Maintain therapy materials and maintain organized treatment spaces
Document patient progress and communicate updates to therapists
Provide emotional support and encouragement to patients
Help with scheduling and administrative support

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
